subject: fix(style): replace invalid border-base-300-subtle class in StyleTab
body:
The migration agent incorrectly mapped border-ui-border-subtle to the
nonexistent class border-base-300-subtle (concatenated token names).
The correct DaisyUI equivalent for a subtle border is border-base-200.
Fixed on lines 339 and 446.

Tags: theme, daisyui, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
